name: PageIndex NotebookLM
description: Upload PDFs and chat with them using vectorless, tree-structured RAG powered by PageIndex. A 7-stage pipeline (TOC detection → extraction → JSON transform → physical index assignment → tree build → summaries → page verification) builds a hierarchical document tree with exact page ranges. No vector database, no chunking.

steps.description: Uploads PDF, runs 7-stage PageIndex pipeline via FastAPI, saves tree to Supabase
Tree-based section search using exact start/end page ranges + Groq answer generation
Lists all uploaded documents from Supabase
Returns full nested tree structure JSON for a document

features: Vectorless RAG — no embeddings or vector database
7-stage PageIndex pipeline: TOC detection, extraction, physical index assignment, tree build, summaries, verification
Exact page-range retrieval (start_index → end_index per section)
Multi-key Groq pool with round-robin rotation for free-tier throughput
Fallback extraction for documents without a formal TOC
